home.heroSubtitle: Post a job, get quotes from verified businesses, and book the best pro in Calgary.
home.step1Desc: Describe what you need, set your budget, and pick a time.
home.step2Desc: Verified local businesses compete for your job.
home.step3Desc: Compare quotes, check reviews, and book with one tap.
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Join thousands of Calgarians finding better local services.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your SwingBy account
auth.signupSubtitle: Join SwingBy as a client or business
auth.verifyEmailDesc: We sent a confirmation link to your email.

dashboard.noBookingsDesc: Post a job to get started

howItWorks.title: How SwingBy Works
howItWorks.clientStep1Desc: Describe the service you need, set a budget, and choose your preferred date.
howItWorks.clientStep2Desc: Get competitive quotes from verified local businesses.
howItWorks.clientStep3Desc: Compare ratings, reviews, and prices. Book with one tap.
howItWorks.clientStep4Desc: Rate your experience and pay securely through the app.
howItWorks.bizStep1Desc: Set up your business, add services, and showcase your team.
howItWorks.bizStep2Desc: See job posts from clients in your area and service category.
howItWorks.bizStep3Desc: One tap to quote. No essays, no proposals — just your price.
howItWorks.bizStep4Desc: Build your reputation with reviews and earn more bookings.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No monthly fees. No hidden costs. Pay only when you earn.
pricing.platformFeeDesc: Deducted from each completed job. That's it.
pricing.freeForClientsDesc: Posting jobs, receiving quotes, and booking are completely free.
pricing.forBusinessesDesc: A simple 10% platform fee on each completed job. No monthly fees, no signup costs.
pricing.faq1A: The 10% platform fee is only deducted after a job is completed and the client confirms satisfaction. No upfront costs.
pricing.faq2A: None. The 10% platform fee is the only charge. No monthly subscriptions, no listing fees, no surprise costs.
pricing.faq3A: Yes. There's no contract or commitment. You can stop using SwingBy at any time with no cancellation fees.
pricing.faq4A: Payments are held in escrow when a job is booked. The business receives their payment minus the 10% fee once the job is completed.

forClients.heroSubtitle: Find trusted local pros, compare quotes, and book with confidence — all in one app.
forClients.valueProp1Desc: Every business is background-checked, licensed, and reviewed by real customers. No guesswork.
forClients.valueProp2Desc: Post once, receive multiple quotes. Compare prices, ratings, and availability side by side.
forClients.valueProp3Desc: Your money is released in two stages — half at booking, half when the job is done right. Dispute resolution included.
forClients.useCase1Desc: Sarah's pipe burst at 11 PM. She posted a job on SwingBy and had a licensed plumber at her door within the hour.
forClients.useCase2Desc: James needed his apartment spotless for inspection in 48 hours. Three cleaning pros quoted within minutes.
forClients.useCase3Desc: Priya needed 15 odd jobs done in her new home. One handyman, one visit, everything handled.
forClients.finalCtaTitle: Ready to find your next pro?
forClients.finalCtaSubtitle: Download SwingBy and post your first job in under a minute.

forBusinesses.heroSubtitle: Get discovered by local clients, win more jobs, and build your reputation — with zero upfront cost.
forBusinesses.valueProp1Desc: Reach thousands of clients actively looking for your services. No advertising spend required.
forBusinesses.valueProp2Desc: Manage quotes, bookings, and payments from one dashboard. Spend time on jobs, not paperwork.
forBusinesses.valueProp3Desc: Collect verified reviews automatically. A strong profile means more wins and higher rates.
forBusinesses.pricingDesc: 10% platform fee per completed job. No monthly fees. No signup costs. No contracts.
forBusinesses.story1Quote: SwingBy doubled our monthly bookings in the first 60 days. The lead quality is way better than other platforms.
forBusinesses.story2Quote: We went from 3 recurring clients to 25 in under 3 months. The quoting system makes it effortless.
forBusinesses.story3Quote: Best part? No upfront cost. We only pay when we actually earn. That's how it should be.
forBusinesses.finalCtaSubtitle: Join hundreds of Calgary businesses already winning on SwingBy.

categoriesIndex.heroSubtitle: Find the right professional for any job around your home or business.

categoryPage.notFoundDesc: The category you're looking for doesn't exist. Browse all categories to find what you need.

citiesIndex.heroSubtitle: SwingBy is growing city by city. See where we're live.
citiesIndex.calgaryDesc: Our launch city. 500+ verified businesses and growing.
citiesIndex.moreCitiesDesc: We're expanding across Canada. Want SwingBy in your city?

calgary.heroSubtitle: Calgary's go-to marketplace for local home services. Verified businesses, transparent pricing, and fast bookings.
calgary.ctaTitle: Join Calgary's fastest-growing home services marketplace
calgary.ctaSubtitle: Whether you're looking for help or offering services, SwingBy connects you with your community.

safety.heroSubtitle: We've built trust and security into every step of the SwingBy experience.
safety.verifyStep1Desc: Every business owner provides government-issued ID and undergoes identity verification before joining the platform.
safety.verifyStep2Desc: We verify trade licenses, business registrations, and insurance coverage to ensure every pro meets local requirements.
safety.verifyStep3Desc: Businesses are continuously monitored through client reviews, complaint tracking, and periodic re-verification.
safety.insuranceDesc: All jobs booked through SwingBy include basic liability coverage. Businesses are required to carry their own professional insurance, and we verify it.
safety.disputeDesc: If something goes wrong, our dedicated support team steps in. We offer mediation, refund review, and escalation paths to ensure fair outcomes for both clients and businesses.
safety.contactDesc: If you ever feel unsafe or need to report an issue, reach out to our trust & safety team directly.

about.heroSubtitle: We're building the future of local services — starting in Calgary.
about.missionDesc: To make finding and booking local home services as simple as ordering a ride. Transparent pricing, verified professionals, and a seamless experience for everyone.
about.storyP1: SwingBy started with a simple frustration: finding a reliable local service provider shouldn't require a dozen phone calls and guesswork.
about.storyP2: We built a marketplace that connects Calgary homeowners with verified local businesses. One post, multiple quotes, easy booking. That's it.
about.member1Bio: Product builder with a passion for simplifying local commerce.
about.member2Bio: Full-stack engineer focused on building reliable, scalable platforms.
about.member3Bio: Operations expert ensuring every service experience meets the highest standard.
about.visionDesc: A world where every homeowner can find trusted help in minutes, and every local business has a fair shot at growing.

press.heroSubtitle: The latest news and updates from SwingBy.
press.emptyDesc: We're preparing some exciting announcements. Stay tuned.
press.pressKitDesc: Download our brand assets, logos, and guidelines for media use.
press.mediaContactDesc: For press inquiries, interviews, or media requests, reach out to our communications team.

careers.heroSubtitle: We're building the future of local services — and we'd love your help.
careers.emptyDesc: We're a small but mighty team. When we grow, this is where open roles will appear.
careers.perk1Desc: Work from anywhere in Canada. We believe great work happens where you're most comfortable.
careers.perk2Desc: Every team member gets equity. We're building this together.
careers.perk3Desc: Take the time you need. We trust you to manage your own schedule.
careers.perk4Desc: $1,500/year for courses, books, conferences — anything that helps you grow.
careers.value1Desc: We move quickly, gather feedback, and iterate. Perfection is the enemy of progress.
careers.value2Desc: We trust our team, our businesses, and our clients. Transparency is our foundation.
careers.value3Desc: We exist to serve local communities. Every decision starts with impact.
